title: Ability to View Subitem's Item Page while in Public View
excerpt: While sharing a public link to a board, we would love the ability to expand an individual subitem so the view can see what’s within the Item Page. So, a viewer should be able to click on Open Subitem on subitem 1 and it …

posts.author: jotter (Jodie Otter)
posts.cookedHtml: While sharing a public link to a board, we would love the ability to expand an individual subitem so the view can see what’s within the Item Page. So, a viewer should be able to click on Open Subitem on subitem 1 and it open the item card so the viewer can read updates/files/etc. or not depending on the permissions the account owner sets. This is useful for sharing with teams not integrated into Monday and would find tit a barrier to create an account as a Guest.

posts.author: WeymannServices (David Singer)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to share a board and they need to see subitems - has anyone read Jodie’s post and can you answer us?
